prompt: Create a dramatic Brazilian football club signing announcement poster in a vertical 2:3 layout, with a gritty high-contrast sports-marketing aesthetic in yellow, dark green, black, and gold. The main subject is a muscular tattooed male footballer wearing a bright yellow Mirassol FC home jersey, shown as a large centered half-body portrait from chest up, facing forward with a serious intimidating expression. He has a shaved head, visible neck and arm tattoos, and a broad athletic build. The jersey has dark green trim on the collar and sleeves, the Mirassol crest with two stars on the chest, the ATHLETA logo on the opposite chest, a large green sponsor wordmark reading “Poty” across the torso, shoulder brand marks, and a circular sleeve sponsor patch. Behind him, place a dramatic waving Mirassol flag in dark green and yellow on the upper right with a large club crest and two stars, glowing stadium lights, smoky golden particles, and a night stadium crowd background. On the left side, stack large bold condensed text in Portuguese: “BEM-VINDO AO” above an oversized yellow “MIRASOL”, then the player name split across 2 lines as “ALEX” and “POATAN” in huge white letters, with a handwritten yellow signature-style “Poatan” beneath. Below that, add a 4-line motivational block in uppercase white text with the final line highlighted in yellow: “DE CAMPEÃO / NO OCTÓGONO / PARA GUERREIRO / EM CAMPO. / A LUTA CONTINUA.” On the right side, add a vertical info panel with 3 icon-and-word traits, each in yellow with matching symbols: target icon with “FOCO”, fist icon with “DISCIPLINA”, and helmet icon with “GARRA”, then below them a bold yellow callout: “AGORA É PELO LEÃO!”. Include 2 smaller secondary player images at the bottom: 1 on the lower left, a cropped front three-quarter pose kissing the club badge on the jersey; and 1 on the lower center-right, a back view with both arms raised and index fingers pointing upward. On the back-view jersey, show the sponsor text “DS TECNOLOGIA AUTOMOTIVA” across the upper back, the name “POATAN”, and the number “10” in large green numerals. Add a black-and-gold bottom strip containing 4 values separated evenly with icons: lion head and “MENTALIDADE DE CAMPEÃO”, shield and “FORÇA E HONRA”, star and “HUMILDADE E TRABALHO”, soccer ball and “PAIXÃO PELO JOGO”. Beneath that, place a yellow banner with the slogan “NOVO DESAFIO. MESMA MISSÃO.” and at the very bottom a handwritten white phrase “FÉ, FOCO E FAMÍLIA!” followed by the hashtag “#POATANÉLEÃO”. Use cinematic rim lighting, intense contrast, metallic golden glow, textured smoke, and premium club-announcement poster design.
